title: Core Characteristics of the Database Approach
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected characteristics that define the database approach and differentiate it from traditional file-based systems.
elements: Sharing of Data and Multiuser Transaction Processing
relationships: Self-Describing Nature and Data Abstraction enable Program-Data Independence
Program-Data Independence allows for Support of Multiple Views
Support of Multiple Views facilitates the Sharing of Data and Multiuser Transaction Processing
